Industry guide

Claude for fitness & wellness.

Independent fitness and wellness owners wear every hat — coach, marketer, ops manager, customer service. AI does not replace the coaching, but it removes the parts of the business that pull you away from coaching. Here is the practical workflow.

The 5 workflows

Where AI saves owner time

1. Program documentation. Workout templates, nutrition guides, member-facing program descriptions.

2. Member communications. Welcome sequences, check-ins, birthday messages, reactivation outreach.

3. Social media. Daily Instagram, transformation stories (with permission), educational content.

4. Coach training and SOPs. Standardize the coaching experience across staff.

5. Retention sequences. Member behavior signals churn risk; targeted outreach addresses it.

What stays human

The coaching core

The actual coaching relationship. AI cannot replace presence with a member.

Form correction. Always human.

Recovery from injury. Personalized, human work.

Difficult member conversations (refunds, behavior issues, etc.). Personal touch matters.

Realistic deployment

For a small gym or studio

Owner uses Claude Pro ($20/mo) for personal workflow. Plus a one-time setup of Member Communications Project (~$500-$1,500 if outsourced).

Typical time savings: 5-8 hours/week of owner time, redirected to higher-value coaching and member experience.
